title: Meal nutrition
description: Computed nutrition totals for one plan_meals slot (its recipe's ingredient nutrition scaled to the slot's servings). Written by the nutritionist when a meal is planned.

planMealId.description: the plan_meals slot these totals are for (one row per slot)

calories.description: total kcal for the slot as cooked (scaled by servings)

protein.description: total grams of protein for the slot

carbs.description: total grams of carbohydrate for the slot

fat.description: total grams of fat for the slot

meal.description: the plan slot these totals are for
